title: CEFR Reference Level Descriptions
attribution: Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference resources.
allowedUse: Use as framework reference/metadata; do not republish copyrighted descriptors verbatim without permission.

title: Tatoeba Corpus Downloads
licenseName: CC BY 2.0 FR / mixed attribution per sentence
attribution: Tatoeba Project contributors; preserve per-sentence attribution where imported.
allowedUse: Stage sentence examples only with source metadata and attribution; approve before learner publishing.

title: WordNet License and Use
allowedUse: Stage lexical definitions/synsets with attribution and source hash; approve before learner publishing.

title: Project Gutenberg License Guidance
licenseName: Project Gutenberg terms / public domain review required per item
attribution: Project Gutenberg and the relevant text author where applicable.
allowedUse: Stage candidate reading texts only after item-level public-domain/license review.

title: USA.gov Government Copyright Guidance
attribution: USA.gov guidance; verify each source for third-party material.
allowedUse: Use only for item-level rights review of U.S. government educational text; do not assume all linked content is public domain.
